title: Crystal PVP Utilities
description: Adds useful crystal pvp features. Available for Fabricmc!
body:
**REQUIRES: [Fabric Api](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)**

# Features

<details>
<summary>Highlight</summary>

Highlights items inside your inventory or hotbar

|Command|Description|
|-|-|
|/cpvp_utils highlight disable|Disables the "Highlight" feature|
|/cpvp_utils highlight enable|Disables the "Highlight" feature|
|/cpvp_utils highlight toggle|Toggles the "Highlight" feature|
|/cpvp_utils highlight get|Gets the color of an item|
|/cpvp_utils highlight list|Lists all the items and their respective color|
|/cpvp_utils highlight remove|Removes the color of an item|
|/cpvp_utils highlight set|Sets the color of an item|

</details>


<details>
<summary>Always show offhand slot</summary>

Shows the offhand slot, even when there is no offhand item. 

**NOTE: When not using Always show offhand slot, No Totem Icon will only show when the slot is not empty**

|Command|Description|
|-|-|
|/cpvp_utils always_show_offhand_slot disable|Disables the "Always show offhand slot" feature|
|/cpvp_utils always_show_offhand_slot enable|Disables the "Always show offhand slot" feature|
|/cpvp_utils always_show_offhand_slot toggle|Toggles the "Always show offhand slot" feature|

</details>



<details>
<summary>No Totem Icon</summary>

Shows a blinking totem exclamation point when no totem is in offhand.
The texture can be be changed with a texturepack.

**NOTE: When not using Always show offhand slot, No Totem Icon will only show when the slot is not empty**

|Command|Description|
|-|-|
|/cpvp_utils no_totem_icon disable|Disables the "No Totem Icon" feature|
|/cpvp_utils no_totem_icon enable|Disables the "No Totem Icon" feature|
|/cpvp_utils no_totem_icon toggle|Toggles the "No Totem Icon" feature|

</details>
